The plant has been reported to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of various conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Koanophyllon mornicola include flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties.
